A

AbstractTemplatingEngineAdapter - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.api
Provides abstractions around the template engine adapter interface, for reuse by implementers.
AbstractTemplatingEngineAdapter() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.api.AbstractTemplatingEngineAdapter
 
addResult(Validated) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationResult
Adds a validation state to the final results.
allOf - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SchemaSupportFeature
The json schema Composition allOf keyword If a composed schema uses the allOf keyword, then payloads must be valid against all the given allOf schemas
AnnotationType - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations
 
anyOf - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SchemaSupportFeature
The json schema Composition anyOf keyword If a composed schema uses the anyOf keyword, then payloads must be valid against any of the given anyOf schemas
AnyType - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
When no type is defined, any data type is accepted
Api - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DocumentationFeature
Generated output includes documentation for all generated APIs.
API - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType
 
API_DOCS - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
API_TESTS - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
APIDocs - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType
 
ApiKey - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports header-based api-key http auth.
APIS - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
APITests - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType
 
Array - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports arrays of data
ArrayOfCollectionOfEnum - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports an array of arrays (enums)
ArrayOfCollectionOfModel - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports an array of arrays (models)
ArrayOfCollectionOfPrimitives - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports an array of arrays (primitives)
ArrayOfEnum - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports an array of enum
ArrayOfModel - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports an array of models
Authorizations - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.ClientModificationFeature
Supports customizing authorizations in generated client output.
AWSV4Signature - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports AWS v4 signature, only for a few generators and with config option withAWSV4Signature=true

B

BasePath - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.ClientModificationFeature
Supports defining a custom overall base path in generated client output.
BasePath - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports providing an API prefix, appended to the host.
BasicAuth - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports header-based basic http auth.
BearerToken - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports header-based bearer auth (e.g.
BETA - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.Stability
The feature may be partially incomplete, but breaking changes will be avoided between major releases.
Binary - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports string/binary: any collection of octets
Body - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.ParameterFeature
Supports body parameters.
Boolean - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports boolean
build() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings.Builder
Returns a GeneratorSettings built from the parameters previously set.
build() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings.Builder
Returns a WorkflowSettings built from the parameters previously set.
build() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Returns a FeatureSet built from the parameters previously set.
build() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata.Builder
Returns a GeneratorMetadata built from the parameters previously set.
Builder() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings.Builder
Instantiates a new Builder.
Byte - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports string/byte: base64 encoded

C

Callbacks - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports OAS 3.x callbacks.
ClientModificationFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
Defines a general set of modifications supported by a generated client.
clientModificationFeatures(EnumSet<ClientModificationFeature>) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Sets the clientModificationFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
CollectionFormat - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports specifying the format of the array if type array is used (one of: csv, ssv, tsv, pipes).
CollectionFormatMulti - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports collection format=multi.
compileTemplate(TemplatingExecutor, Map<String, Object>, String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplatingEngineAdapter
Compiles a template into a string
Composite - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SchemaSupportFeature
Support of complex schemas (those which refer to the properties of another model).
Constants() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
consume(ValidationResult) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationResult
 
Consumes - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports a globally defined array of consumable MimeTypes.
Context<TSpecDocument> - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.config
The Context used for generation.
Context(TSpecDocument, GeneratorSettings, WorkflowSettings) - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.config.Context
Instantiates a new Context.
Cookie - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.ParameterFeature
Supports Cookie parameters.
create(Severity, String, String, Function<T, ValidationRule.Result>) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule
Create an instance of a ValidationRule
Custom - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports a generator-specific support usually via type=string's format property (e.g.
Custom - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.WireFormatFeature
Supports other mime types or wire formats for transfer, to be documented by generators.

D

DataTypeFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
Defines common data types supported by a generator.
dataTypeFeatures(EnumSet<DataTypeFeature>) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Sets the dataTypeFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
Date - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports string/date: full-date RFC3339
DateTime - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports string/date-time: date-time RFC3339
Decimal - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports number/decimal (a special case for some languages)

DEFAULT_VERBOSE - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings

DocumentationFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features

error(String, Function<T, ValidationRule.Result>) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule
Create an instance of a ValidationRule which should result in an error should the evaluate of this rule fail.
error(Path, String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateProcessor
Allow a caller to mark a path having errored during processing with accompanying reason
ERROR - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Severity
Higher severity indicating that the target state is not supported, or is known to cause problems with the application.
evaluate(Object) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule
Evaluate an instance of an object against this rule.
Examples - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Allows the ability to provide example input/output structures, usually in JSON format.
excludeClientModificationFeatures(ClientModificationFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined ClientModificationFeature from the set of supported features.
excludeDataTypeFeatures(DataTypeFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined DataTypeFeature from the set of supported features.
excludeDocumentationFeatures(DocumentationFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined DocumentationFeature from the set of supported features.
excludeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined GlobalFeature from the set of supported features.
excludeParameterFeatures(ParameterFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined ParameterFeature from the set of supported features.
excludeSchemaSupportFeatures(SchemaSupportFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined SchemaSupportFeature from the set of supported features.
excludeSecurityFeatures(SecurityFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined SecurityFeature from the set of supported features.
excludeWireFormatFeatures(WireFormatFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Excludes the defined WireFormatFeature from the set of supported features.
EXPERIMENTAL - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.Stability
The feature is still under active development and subject to non-backward compatible changes or removal in any future version.
ExternalDocumentation - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Exposes external documentation defined in the specification document to generated code.

A generic implementation of a validator instance which simply applies rules to an input instance.

Constructs a new instance of GenericValidator.

Gets additional properties which will be passed to template as dynamic properties.
getAll() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationResult
Gets all the validated states resulting from the evaluation.
getApiNameSuffix() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets a api name suffix for generated models.
getApiPackage() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets the api package name for generated sources.

Gets artifact id for generated sources which support this concept (e.g.
getArtifactVersion() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets artifact version for generated sources which support this concept (e.g.
getClientModificationFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
Returns the set of client modification features supported by the generator.
getDataTypeFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
Returns the set of common data types supported by the generator
getDescription() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule
Gets a description to help differentiate this rule from others (not intended to be user-facing).
getDestinationFilename() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateDefinition
Gets target output location for the file, relative to the output directory.

getDocumentationFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
Returns the documentation type available in generated output.
getEnumNameMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets enum name mappings between an enum name and the new name.
getErrors() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationResult
Gets a filters list of Invalid states with the level of Severity.ERROR
getFailureMessage() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule
Gets the message to be displayed in the event of a test failure (intended to be user-facing).
getFeatureCategory() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.FeatureSetFlattened
 
getFeatureName() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.FeatureSetFlattened
 
getFeatureSet() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata
Returns the feature set supported by the generator.
getFileExtensions() - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplatingEngineAdapter
During generation, if a supporting file has a file extension that is inside that array, then it is considered a templated supporting file and we use the templating engine adapter to generate it
getFolder() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateDefinition
Gets a folder in the target output directory in which to place the target file.
getFullTemplateContents(String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplatingExecutor
returns the template content by name
getFullTemplatePath(String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplatePathLocator
Get the full path to a relative template file.
getFullTemplatePath(String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplatingExecutor
Returns the path of a template, allowing access to the template where consuming literal contents aren't desirable or possible.
getGenerationMessage() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata
Returns a message which can be displayed during generation.
getGeneratorName() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets the name of the generator to use.
getGeneratorSettings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.Context
Gets the generator settings.
getGitHost() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets git host.
getGitRepoId() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets git repo id.
getGitUserId() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets git user id.
getGlobalFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
Returns the spec features supported "globally" for a document (shared across all operations and/or models).
getGlobalProperties() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Gets system properties applied to the generator.
getGroupId() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets the group id for generated sources which support this concept (e.g.
getHttpUserAgent() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets the http user agent to be used by client generators which support setting this value.
getIdentifier() - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplatingEngineAdapter
Provides an identifier used to load the adapter.
getIgnoreFileOverride() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Gets the override location for the .openapi-generator-ignore file.
getImportMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets import mappings between a given class and the import that should be used for that class.
getInlineSchemaNameMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets inline schema name mappings between an inline schema name and the new name.
getInlineSchemaOptions() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets inline schema options
getInputSpec() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Gets input spec's location, as URL or file
getInstantiationTypes() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets instantiation types mappings.
getInvokerPackage() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets the invoker package name for generated sources.
getLanguageSpecificPrimitives() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets language specific primitives.
getLibrary() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets library (sub-template) for the target generated.
getLibraryFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata
Returns the list of features supported by generator libraries.

getModelNameMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings

getModelPackage() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings

getNameMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings

getOpenapiGeneratorIgnoreList() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings

getOpenapiNormalizer() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings

getOperationIdNameMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets operation id name mappings between an operation id name and the new name.
getOutputDir() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Gets the output dir (where we write generated files).
getPackageName() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets the overall package name for generated sources.
getParameterFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
Returns the types of parameters supported by endpoints in the generated code.
getParameterNameMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets parameter name mappings between a parameter name and the new name.
getReleaseNote() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets release note for the generated instance.
getReservedWordsMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets reserved word mappings.

getSchemaMappings() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings

getSchemaSupportFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
Returns special circumstances handled by the generator.
getSecurityFeatures() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
Returns the security features supported in the generated code.
getServerVariables() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
Gets server variable.
getSeverity() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Invalid
Get details about the severity of this invalid state.
getSeverity() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule
Get the level of severity which this rule considers a failure in evaluation.

getSpecDocument() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.Context

Returns an enum describing the stability index of the generator.
getTemplateDir() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Gets the directory holding templates used in generation.

Gets the name of the templating engine to target.

Returns the wire format options officially supported by the generated code.

Gets the workflow settings.
GlobalFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
Defines a set of globally available features.

I

ignore(Path, String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateProcessor
Allow a caller to mark a path as ignored with accompanying reason
includeClientModificationFeatures(ClientModificationFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined ClientModificationFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
includeDataTypeFeatures(DataTypeFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined DataTypeFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
includeDocumentationFeatures(DocumentationFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined DocumentationFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
includeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined GlobalFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
includeParameterFeatures(ParameterFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined ParameterFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
includeSchemaSupportFeatures(SchemaSupportFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined SchemaSupportFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
includeSecurityFeatures(SecurityFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined SecurityFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
includeWireFormatFeatures(WireFormatFeature...) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Includes the defined WireFormatFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
Info - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports passing information about the target server to the client.
Int32 - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports integer/int32
Int64 - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports integer/int64
invalid(ValidationRule, String) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Validated
Creates an instance of an Invalid validation state.
invalid(ValidationRule, String, String) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Validated
Creates an instance of an Invalid validation state.
Invalid - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
Represents a Validated state which is "Invalid" to some degree of Severity.
Invalid(ValidationRule, String, String) - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Invalid
Constructs a new Invalid instance.
isEnableMinimalUpdate() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not the generation should update only those files which have changed.
isEnablePostProcessFile() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not file post-processing is enabled for generators which support it.
isGenerateAliasAsModel() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not the generation should convert aliases (primitives defined as schema for use within documents) as models.
isLogToStderr() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not the generator's executor will write all log messages (not just errors) to STDOUT.
isRemoveOperationIdPrefix() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not to remove the prefix of operationId, e.g.
isSkipOperationExample() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not to skip examples defined in the operation.
isSkipOverwrite() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not the existing files should be overwritten during the generation.
isStrictSpecBehavior() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not 'MUST' and 'SHALL' wording in the api specification is strictly adhered to.
isSupported() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.FeatureSetFlattened
 
isValidateSpec() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Indicates whether or not generation should also validate an input specification.
isVerbose() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Configures verbosity of generation.

J

JSON - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.WireFormatFeature
Supports JSON transfer

L

libraryFeatures(Map<String, FeatureSet>) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata.Builder
Sets the libraryFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
LinkObjects - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports OAS 3.x link objects, but does *NOT* suggest generated clients auto-follow links.

M

MapOfCollectionOfEnum - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports a map of arrays (enums)
MapOfCollectionOfModel - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports a map of arrays (models)
MapOfCollectionOfPrimitives - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports a map of arrays (primitives)
MapOfEnum - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports a map of enums
MapOfModel - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports a map of models
Maps - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports map of data
MockServer - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.ClientModificationFeature
Supports mock server.
Model - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType
 
Model - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DocumentationFeature
Generated output includes documentation for all generated models.
MODEL_DOCS - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
MODEL_TESTS - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
ModelDocs - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType
 
MODELS - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
ModelTests - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType
 
modify() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
 
MultiServer - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports targeting one or more servers.

N

newBuilder() - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
New builder builder.
newBuilder() - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
 
newBuilder() - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
 
newBuilder() - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata
Creates a new builder object for GeneratorMetadata.
newBuilder(GeneratorSettings) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.GeneratorSettings
 
newBuilder(WorkflowSettings) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
 
newBuilder(FeatureSet) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet
 
newBuilder(GeneratorMetadata) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata
 
not - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SchemaSupportFeature
The json schema Composition not keyword If a composed schema uses the not keyword, then payloads must not be valid against the given not schema
Null - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
A JSON "null" value added in openapi v3.1.0

O

OAS2 - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations.AnnotationType
 
OAS2 - Annotation Type in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations
 
OAS3 - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations.AnnotationType
 
OAS3 - Annotation Type in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations
 
OAuth2_AuthorizationCode - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports authorization via OAuth2 flow ("accessCode" in OAS 2.0).
OAuth2_ClientCredentials - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports authorization via OAuth2 client credentials flow ("application" in OAS 2.0).
OAuth2_Implicit - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports authorization via OAuth2 implicit flow.
OAuth2_Password - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports authorization via OAuth2 password flow.
Object - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
An unordered set of properties mapping a string to an instance
oneOf - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SchemaSupportFeature
The json schema Composition oneOf keyword If a composed schema uses the oneOf keyword, then payloads must be valid against one of the given oneOf schemas
OpenIDConnect - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports openid connect based http auth.
org.openapitools.codegen.api - package org.openapitools.codegen.api
 
org.openapitools.codegen.config - package org.openapitools.codegen.config
 
org.openapitools.codegen.meta - package org.openapitools.codegen.meta
 
org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features - package org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
 
org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations - package org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations
 
org.openapitools.codegen.validation - package org.openapitools.codegen.validation
 

P

ParameterFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
Defines parameters supported by endpoints in the generated code.
parameterFeatures(EnumSet<ParameterFeature>) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Sets the parameterFeature and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
ParameterizedServer - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports targeting one or more servers, PLUS the ability to provide values for templated server parts
ParameterStyling - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports OAS 3.x "style" for parameters.
PartialSchemes - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports fewer than all schemes supported by OpenAPI Specification.
Pass() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Pass
 
Pass(String) - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Pass
 
passed() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Fail
 
passed() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Pass
 
passed() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Result
 
Password - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports string/password: A hint to UIs to obscure input.
Path - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.ParameterFeature
Supports path parameters.
Polymorphism - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SchemaSupportFeature
Support for polymorphic classes.
Produces - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports a globally defined array of produced MimeTypes.
PROTOBUF - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.WireFormatFeature
Supports protocol buffer transfer

Q

Query - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.ParameterFeature
Supports query parameters.

R

Readme - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DocumentationFeature
Generated output includes a README.
Result() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Result
 
rules - Variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.GenericValidator
 

S

SchemaSupportFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
Defines special circumstances handled by the generator.
schemaSupportFeatures(EnumSet<SchemaSupportFeature>) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Sets the schemaSupportFeature and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
Schemes - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Supports customization of the scheme "http", "https", "ws", "wss".
SecurityFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
Defines security features supported in the generated code.
securityFeatures(EnumSet<SecurityFeature>) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder
Sets the securityFeature and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
setDetails(String) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Result
 
setTemplateType(TemplateFileType) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateDefinition
Sets the type of template
Severity - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
Defines different levels of severity to be used during validation.
SignatureAuth - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SecurityFeature
Supports http signature.
Simple - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.SchemaSupportFeature
Support of simple schemas (those which define properties directly).
skip(Path, String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateProcessor
Allow a caller to mark a path as skipped with accompanying reason
stability(Stability) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.meta.GeneratorMetadata.Builder
Sets the stability and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
Stability - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta
Represents the "stability index" of a generator or feature, based on the stability indexes defined in the node.js ecosystem.
STABLE - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.Stability
The feature or features are considered complete and "production-ready".
String - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.DataTypeFeature
Supports string
SUPPORTING_FILES - Static variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType.Constants
 
SupportingFiles - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateFileType
 

T

TemplateDefinition - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.api
TemplateDefinition is a type which defines the basics of a template file and target output location.
TemplateDefinition() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateDefinition
Parameter-less constructor for TemplateDefinition, used for simplified serialization (see DynamicSettings).
TemplateDefinition(String, String) - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateDefinition
Constructor for TemplateDefinition.
TemplateDefinition(String, String, String) - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateDefinition
Constructor for TemplateDefinition.
templateExists(TemplatingExecutor, String) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplatingEngineAdapter
Determines whether the template file with supported extensions exists.
TemplateFileType - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.api
Represents the type of a generator's templating files.
TemplateFileType.Constants - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.api
 
TemplatePathLocator - Interface in org.openapitools.codegen.api
Provides means for searching for "actual" template location based on relative template file.
TemplateProcessor - Interface in org.openapitools.codegen.api
Interface for abstractions around writing templated data to a file.
templateType - Variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateDefinition
 
TemplatingEngineAdapter - Interface in org.openapitools.codegen.api
Each templating engine is called by an Adapter, selected at runtime
TemplatingExecutor - Interface in org.openapitools.codegen.api
interface to the full template content implementers might take into account the -t cli option, look in the resources for a generator specific template, etc
TemplatingGenerator - Interface in org.openapitools.codegen.api
Deprecated.
as of 5.0, replaced by TemplatingExecutor.
throwable - Variable in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Result
 
thrown() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule.Result
 
ToolingExtension - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations.AnnotationType
 
ToolingExtension - Annotation Type in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.annotations

toString() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
 
toString() - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule

V

valid(ValidationRule) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Validated
Creates an instance of an Valid validation state.
Valid - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
Represents a Validated state which is "valid" according to the defined rule.
validate(TInput) - Method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.GenericValidator
Validates input, resulting in a instance of ValidationResult which provides details on all validations performed (success, error, warning).
validate(TInput) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Validator
Validates input, resulting in a instance of ValidationResult which provides details on all validations performed (success, error, warning).
Validated - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
Provides details about the state of a completed validation.
Validated() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Validated
 
ValidationResult - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
Encapsulates details about the result of a validation test.

Constructs a new ValidationResult instance.
ValidationRule - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
Defines a rule to be evaluated against some target object.
ValidationRule.Fail - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
 
ValidationRule.Pass - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
 
ValidationRule.Result - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
 
Validator<TInput> - Interface in org.openapitools.codegen.validation
Defines a contract allowing some input to be validated.

Returns the value for this template file type

W

warn(String, String, Function<T, ValidationRule.Result>) - Static method in class org.openapitools.codegen.validation.ValidationRule
Create an instance of a ValidationRule which should result in a warning should the evaluate of this rule fail.
WARNING - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.validation.Severity
Lower severity indicating that the target state may be unpredictable, no longer supported, or known to have issues.
WireFormatFeature - Enum in org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features
Defines wire formats explicitly defined in spec or supported by the tool.

Sets the wireFormatFeatures and return a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.

WorkflowSettings - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.config
Represents those settings applied to a generation workflow.
WorkflowSettings() - Constructor for class org.openapitools.codegen.config.WorkflowSettings
Instantiates a new workflow settings.
WorkflowSettings.Builder - Class in org.openapitools.codegen.config
WorkflowSettings builder static inner class.
write(Map<String, Object>, String, File) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateProcessor
Writes data to a compiled template
writeToFile(String, byte[]) - Method in interface org.openapitools.codegen.api.TemplateProcessor
Write bytes to a file

X

XML - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.WireFormatFeature
Supports XML transfer
XMLStructureDefinitions - Enum constant in enum org.openapitools.codegen.meta.features.GlobalFeature
Differs from supporting the MimeType.XML feature, in that this option indicates whether XML structures can be defined by spec document and honored by the caller.
